CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-27-2002 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up On Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On September 12, 2002.
Off Calendar Sep-27-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for hearing this day on Default Prove-Up. Plaintiff represented by and through his counsel, Mark Joseph Romero, Esq. presents evidence. Plaintiff, Edward K. Newman was sworn and examined. The court enters defaults against the following: 1) William L. Morgan; 2) Sterling Signatures Corp., 3) Alice Morgan and Hatis Corporation. Exhibit l - Summary of 6 loan transactions was marked for identification. The matter was argued and submitted. The Court the matter under submission for decision.
